# agentDidUpdate(_:)

**Instance Method**

Tells the delegate that an agent has just performed a simulation step.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func agentDidUpdate(_ agent: GKAgent)
```

## Parameters

- **agent**: The agent object that has just performed a simulation step.

## Discussion

Implement this method when you want to update a display based on the latest data from the agent simulation. Read the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent2D/position] and [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent2D/rotation] properties of the agent (as a [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent2D] or [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent3D] object), then set the corresponding attributes of the object that provides the agent’s visual representation.

## Synchronizing with Agents

- **agentWillUpdate(_:)**: Tells the delegate that an agent is about to perform its next simulation step.
